programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-landlord, alleging negligence that caused her service horse, Ruby, to injure her leg on nails sticking out of a stable door; the landlord countersues, citing lease violations and pointing to a signed release of liability.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A 29-year-old man, who was adopted from foster care as a child, takes legal action against his estranged aunt, seeking $10,000 in damages for wrongful eviction and property damage.

programme.sub-title: Did You Watch Him Torture Your Son?

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Dad Denied Me Until He Died; Unlock: I Think You're Cheating With My Family Member

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A young widow with a newborn baby claims her deceased husband's best friend stole money from his account; the best friend defends his actions passionately and says the money went to a GoFundMe set up for his children.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Former army buddies pool their resources to purchase one luxury vehicle in order to start a car rental business; a doomed rental ends with the vehicle being wrecked, their insurance being dropped and thousands in damage.
